spec.rawSql:
SELECT
trade_id,
broker,
asset,
risk_score,
trade_amount,
settlement_status
FROM trades
ORDER BY risk_score > 90 DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
trade_id,
broker,
asset,
trade_amount,
risk_score,
settlement_status,
timestamp
FROM trades
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10;

select count(*) from trades
where settlement_status = 'FAILED';

SELECT
date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS time,
COUNT(*) AS trades
FROM trades
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS time,
AVG(risk_score) AS avg_risk
FROM trades
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

select count(*) from trades
WHERE risk_score > 90;

select
settlement_status,
count(*) as trades
from trades
group by settlement_status;

SELECT
CASE
WHEN risk_score <30 THEN 'Low'
WHEN risk_score<70 THEN 'Medium'
ELSE 'High'
END AS risk_level,
COUNT(*)
FROM trades
GROUP BY risk_level;

SELECT
broker, sum(trade_amount) AS trades
FROM trades
GROUP BY broker
ORDER BY trades DESC;

SELECT
asset,
SUM(trade_amount) volume
FROM trades
GROUP BY asset
ORDER BY volume DESC;

spec.title: Real-Time Trade Settlement Risk Monitoring System
